title: populating data from Monday form directly into table

posts.author: avann (Aline)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi. I am new to Monday. I have created my table and a form. I want the data entered into the form to go directly into the corresponding cells in my table. However, when I submit a completed test form, the information shows up at the bottom of the table and not in the correct cells. Can you help me? Thanks!

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Aline, happy to help with this! To get started, I want to make sure I fully understand what you’re trying to accomplish. Could you please send over a couple of screenshots? One pointing out where you want the form submission to go, and the other to show where the submission is currently appearing. Thanks so much!
